evals.prompt: 幫我寫一個 Python 腳本修改所有柱的 modifier
evals.expected_output: Should trigger etabs-modeler. Write script using find_etabs, iterate FrameObj, filter columns, apply SetModifiers with [1,1,1,0.0001,0.7,0.7,0.95,0.95].

evals.prompt: 怎麼用 API 查詢某層的層間位移？
evals.expected_output: Should trigger etabs-modeler. Show Results.StoryDrifts or DatabaseTables approach with 'Story Drifts' table key.

evals.prompt: 幫我把所有 beam 的 rigid zone factor 從 0.5 改成 0.75
evals.expected_output: Should trigger etabs-modeler. Write script using SetEndLengthOffset(name, True, 0, 0, 0.75) on all beam frames.
